name: codex-starter
description: Starter Codex plugin scaffold for skills, scripts, hooks, and future integrations.

interface.shortDescription: A lightweight starter plugin you can fork and publish.
interface.longDescription: A minimal but structured Codex plugin scaffold with placeholder assets, optional companion files, and a starter skill folder for future expansion.
defaultPrompt: Help me adapt this starter plugin for my project.
Turn this plugin skeleton into a memory workflow.
Add a new skill and update the plugin metadata.
